cushlabs-voice-agent.headline: Never Miss Another Lead Call
cushlabs-voice-agent.subheadline: AI voice agents that answer every call, qualify leads, and book appointments — 24/7 with sub-500ms response times.
good_for: Service businesses losing leads to voicemail and hold times
Teams paying for receptionists but still missing after-hours calls
Operations that need bilingual phone coverage without hiring
not_for: Businesses with under 20 inbound calls per week
Industries requiring licensed human agents by regulation
Teams that haven't defined their qualification criteria yet
what_you_get: Custom AI voice agent trained on your business, live in 2 weeks
Real-time Google Calendar integration — books confirmed appointments mid-call
Full call analytics dashboard with lead scoring and conversation logs
24/7 coverage with zero hold times and natural conversation flow

converso-ai-chatbot-saas.headline: Your Website Loses Leads While You Sleep
converso-ai-chatbot-saas.subheadline: White-label AI chatbot that knows your business, speaks your customers' language, and converts visitors into booked calls.
good_for: Service businesses in bilingual markets losing after-hours inquiries
Agencies wanting to offer AI chat as a managed service to clients
Teams tired of chatbots that hallucinate answers about their business
not_for: Businesses with no existing website or web presence
Teams that need a simple FAQ page instead of conversational AI
Companies with fewer than 100 monthly website visitors
what_you_get: Multi-tenant SaaS with full data isolation per business
RAG-powered answers grounded in your verified business content
Visual playbook builder for conversation flows — no code required
One-tag embed that drops onto any website in minutes

ny-ai-chatbot.headline: Turn Your Chatbot Into a Revenue Engine
ny-ai-chatbot.subheadline: RAG chatbot engineered to convert website visitors into booked strategy sessions — not just answer FAQs.
good_for: Professional service firms where every booked call is worth $500+
Businesses with strong website content that visitors never find
Teams that want leads qualified 24/7 without hiring SDRs
not_for: E-commerce businesses needing product recommendation engines
Companies without clear service offerings or pricing
Teams looking for a generic FAQ deflection tool
what_you_get: Revenue-first chatbot with sales CTAs woven into every conversation path
Dual-source RAG pulling from your website content and curated knowledge base
Embeddable widget deployable on any domain with one script tag
Admin dashboard with conversation analytics and knowledge management

ny-english-teacher.headline: Stop Trading Hours for Leads
ny-english-teacher.subheadline: Automated lead generation platform that replaces 4 roles — SDR, marketer, assistant, and brand manager — on $0/month infrastructure.
good_for: Solo professionals burning 10+ hours/week on admin and follow-ups
Service providers who can't justify premium pricing with a template website
Businesses in bilingual markets wanting to double their reach from one site
not_for: Businesses that already have a marketing team and CRM pipeline
Companies needing e-commerce or product catalog features
Teams that haven't validated product-market fit yet
what_you_get: 4 diagnostic quizzes that pre-qualify leads without discovery calls
3-step booking flow — interest to confirmed Google Meet in under 60 seconds
Full EN/ES bilingual site with localized routing and SEO
$0/month infrastructure — Astro static + Cloudflare Workers free tier

ai-resume-tailor.headline: 75% of Resumes Never Reach a Human
ai-resume-tailor.subheadline: AI-powered ATS analysis that shows exactly why resumes get filtered and how to fix them — in under 10 seconds.
good_for: Job seekers getting ghosted after applying to dozens of positions
Career coaches who need a scalable tool for client resume reviews
Bilingual professionals applying to jobs in both English and Spanish
not_for: Recruiters looking for candidate sourcing or ATS software
People who need full resume writing or career coaching services
Job seekers applying to companies that don't use ATS systems
what_you_get: Structured ATS analysis with 0-100 match score per job posting
Keyword gap analysis with severity coding and actionable fix suggestions
5 free analyses with zero signup — value delivered before any paywall
Full bilingual support for EN/ES resumes and job descriptions

ai-build-vs-outsource.headline: Stop Guessing on Build vs. Buy Decisions
ai-build-vs-outsource.subheadline: Interactive decision tools with weighted scoring, cost modeling, and board-ready output that replaces gut-feel arguments.
good_for: Operations leaders facing high-stakes build-or-outsource decisions
Teams presenting technology strategy to boards and stakeholders
Growing companies hitting scale inflection points in their operations
not_for: Early-stage startups with no operational complexity yet
Teams that have already committed to a vendor or build path
Organizations looking for a procurement or vendor management tool
what_you_get: 20-criterion weighted scoring across 5 categories with real-time verdict
Operational cost simulator revealing hidden step-function costs
6 decision presets and 5 growth scenarios for rapid what-if analysis
Shareable URL encoding — full tool state in a link for board presentations
